quiz1.missionText: Archive the 3rd email from the top

insight.title: How did you know swiping would archive?
insight.subtitle: Direction and icons teach the action
insight.swipeDesc: In mail and task apps swiping right to left is a standard UI pattern meaning archive or complete.
insight.greenDesc: While red means delete or danger green is used worldwide to mean save or safe.
insight.archiveTitle: Box icon is the universal archive symbol
insight.archiveDesc: A box with a downward arrow is the common archive icon across all mail apps.

insight.title: How did you navigate to trash via the drawer?
insight.subtitle: The hamburger menu is the folder gateway
insight.drawerDesc: The three line icon is a universal UI symbol meaning open hidden menu.
insight.trashTitle: Trash icon is home for deleted items
insight.trashDesc: The trash icon indicates deleted items regardless of operating system.
insight.emptyDesc: Trash is a temporary storage area. Data remains until you press Empty Trash.

insight.title: How did you know long press enables multi select?
insight.subtitle: Long press is the entry to selection mode
insight.longPressTitle: Long press switches to selection mode
insight.longPressDesc: In mail and file management apps long press is the standard interaction to start multi select mode.
insight.checkDesc: The check mark is a universal symbol for selected.
insight.headerDesc: Entering selection mode turns the header blue and shows count and action icons.

quiz4.missionText: Search for emails larger than 5 megabytes
quiz4.hint: Tip: Use larger:5M to search by size

insight.title: How did you think of the larger:5M command?
insight.subtitle: Search operators narrow down emails
insight.operatorTitle: Search operators specify conditions with commands
insight.operatorDesc: Mail apps offer advanced filtering with search operators like larger:5M or from alice.
insight.sizeDesc: M stands for megabytes. This search condition finds emails with large attachments.
insight.hintTitle: Hint feature guides to the answer
insight.hintDesc: The hint button acts as a lifeline in many apps guiding you to the answer.

common.searchPrompt: Enter a search query and press Enter
